item.name: Watermoura
item.description:
While it moves with undeniable grace, the effect is rather spoiled by its brutish appearance.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: With its great fins spread wide, this wavekin flits through the water like...well, one might say a butterfly were it a prettier fish, but as things stand, it puts folk more in mind of a moth.
